skills.name: Montano
skills.description: Attack with a powerful slash on the lower half of an enemy. Temporarily slows down the enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
Adds CaptionRatio % of the Shield's Physical Defense to Physical Attack
[Slow] Duration: CaptionTime second(s)

skills.name: Targe Smash
skills.description: Inflict damage on an enemy with a powerful smash by a shield.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR
Minimum Critical Chance: 20%
Adds CaptionRatio % of the Shield's Physical Defense to Physical Attack

skills.name: Shield Push
skills.description: Interferes with the enemy's actions using a shield. Apply [Reduced DEF] and [Unbalance] to the Target. (Unbalance is not applied to the boss monster.)
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
CaptionRatio2 % of the Shield's Physical Defense added to the Physical Attack
[Decreases Defense] Duration: 10 seconds
[Unbalance] Duration: 3 seconds

skills.name: Slithering
skills.description: Crouch and move forward while holding the key down. Immune to Knockback and Knockdown and increases Block, Physical Defense, and Movement Speed during channeling
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6
Increase Block by CaptionRatio %
Increase Physical Defense by CaptionRatio2 %
Increase Movement Speed by CaptionRatio3
Maximum Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Shooting Star
skills.description: Use your shield and sword to successively attack enemies. When the attack is accurate, adds your shield's physical defense to your physical attack.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR
Minimum Critical Chance: 20%
Adds CaptionRatio % of the Shield's Physical Defense to Physical Attack

skills.name: Shield Bash
skills.description: Ignores enemy's block with Shield and attacks the enemy. Struck enemy gets Shock debuff.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 8
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
[Shock] Duration: 10 seconds
Adds CaptionRatio % of the Shield's Physical Defense to Physical Attack

attributes.name: Shield Mastery: Block Specialty
attributes.description:
* Block increases by 0.75% per attribute level when equipping [Shield], and [Detect Loophole] buff is applied to yourself when succeeding in Block

* [Detect Loophole] : Accuracy and Block Penetration increases by 20% when attacking the enemy

attributes.name: Montano: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Montano] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Targe Smash: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Targe Smash] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Shield Push: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Shield Push] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Shooting Star: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Shooting Star] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Slithering:  Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Slithering] by 0.5% per attribute level

* Increases additionally by 10% when mastering the maximum level

attributes.name: Shield Bash: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Shield Bash] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Rodelero: Shield Attack
attributes.description:
* Instead of nullifying the shield's Defense/Minimum Block Chance, [Attribute level]*6% of Shield's physical defense is added to the Attack of [Targe Smash] / [Montano] / [Shield Bash] / [Shield Push] / [Shooting Star]

* When using the second slot, applied perfectly only when equipping 2 shields. Only half applied when equipping one

* (Ex: When the proportion of the Attack added is 6%, [Defense of first slot shield] * 3% + [Defense of second slot shield] * 3%)

attributes.description: * Apply 2 hits when using [Targe Smash] to enemy under [Debuff]

attributes.name: [Arts] Shooting Star: Violence
attributes.description:
* 20% of Shield Physical Defense is added to [Shooting Star] Attack

* Strike time changed to 12

* Decreases Overheat from 3 to 1 time

* Number of enemy that can be targeted by [Shooting Star] skill is fixed to 1
